name: VELAMENTOUS CORD INSERTION
definition: umbilical cord insertion into membranes outside placental margin = attachment of cord to
dominant_finding: splayed umbilical vessels at periphery of placenta
discriminating_features: segments of umbilical cord course between amnion + chorion unprotected by Wharton jelly /
splayed umbilical vessels at periphery of placenta
